summary: ANDROID 🟥 DSDK DFU for sub devices doesnt work
scenario: App crashes when starting CC or CS Device Firmware Update, and DFU for sub devices fails to work
description_clean: App crashes whenever CC or CS DFU (Device Firmware Update) is started. DFU for sub devices does not work.
expected: DFU process starts successfully without crashing
actual: App crashes whenever CC or CS DFU is started. DFU for sub devices does not work.
